source_pr.title: *: fix the date race in `TestCharsetFeature`
source_pr.body:
- close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/27476
- close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/27474
- close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/27485

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it toggled a global charset/collation feature flag inside the test body, which can race with other tests reading the same global state. This PR stabilizes it by moving the flag enable/disable into serial suite setup/teardown so the global knob is not concurrently mutated across tests.
fix_pattern: Avoid mutating global feature flags inside individual tests; enable/disable global knobs in serial suite setup/teardown to prevent cross-test races.

evidence: evidence: *: fix the date race in `TestCharsetFeature`
